description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a clean, minimalist design. The front features two large glass-paneled doors on the left, allowing visibility into the interior shelving, and four stacked drawers on the right, each with a wooden handle. The cabinet stands on four short, angled wooden legs, giving it a mid-century modern aesthetic. The main body is finished in a smooth, light gray or white color, contrasting with the natural wood accents on the handles and legs. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for displaying decorative items or for practical use. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood and glass materials, with ample storage space inside.
description: A modern sideboard cabinet with glass-paneled doors, four drawers, and wooden handles and legs, finished in light gray or white. It features a flat top and a minimalist, mid-century modern design.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: A side view of the cabinet, displaying a solid, unadorned panel and two wooden legs.
description_view_2: The front of the cabinet, featuring two glass-paneled doors, four drawers with wooden handles, and all four legs visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain side panel and two wooden legs.
